name: TensorPM v1.14.0
body:
# Changelog - v1.14.0

This release completes the file-reliability work from 1.13.x: every file now has a
single, consistent identity across your device and the cloud, so attachments, AI
summaries, and distillation work dependably in cloud workspaces.

## 🐛 Bug Fixes

### Reliable Files in Cloud Workspaces

Files in cloud-synced workspaces are resolved consistently end-to-end, so they can
be attached, summarized, image-analyzed, and picked up by the Distiller again.

**What Changed:**

- Every file is now identified by one stable content fingerprint everywhere — on
  your device and in the cloud — instead of two slightly different forms that could
  drift apart during sync.
- The mismatch that left some cloud files showing "no active paths" (and made the
  Distiller skip them) is resolved.
- A one-time local cleanup converges any remaining older file references on your
  device to the consistent form.

**User Benefit:**
Attaching a file, generating a summary, analyzing an image, or distilling updates
now works reliably for files in cloud workspaces — no more files that silently lose
their link after syncing.

## 🏗️ Improvements

### Simpler, Faster File Lookups

The internal file-reference handling was simplified to use direct identity matching
now that file IDs are consistent everywhere.

**User Benefit:**
File lists, attachment counts, and status badges resolve a touch faster, and sync
does less redundant work on every download.

### Cleaner AI Key Onboarding

The AI key prompt in onboarding was streamlined for a clearer first-run experience.

## 📝 Notes

- The database schema version is updated to **39** to run the one-time file-ID
  convergence migration. This runs automatically on first launch.
- A companion change on the cloud sync backend is already live, so existing cloud
  workspaces heal automatically on the next sync.
- No action is required — local-only projects are unaffected and continue to work
  exactly as before.

---

## 📅 Release Info

- **Version**: 1.14.0
- **Release Date**: 2026-06-30
- **Previous Version**: 1.13.2
- **Type**: Minor Release (Stable)
